product_highlights: SensiCaps™ — encapsulated actives for enhanced stability and controlled release
Chroma-Lite™ — encapsulated natural pigments for long-wear color cosmetics
BioTech Color — naturally derived and fermentation-based colorants with encapsulation
Custom encapsulation of antioxidants, vitamins, and skin-active ingredients
notes: Sensient Technologies is a global manufacturer of natural and synthetic colors, flavors, and fragrances with a specialized personal care division focused on encapsulated color systems and cosmetic actives. Their cosmetic encapsulation portfolio bridges the gap between performance pigments and active ingredient delivery, offering formulators the ability to protect and control-release both chromatic and functional ingredients in a single system. Sensient's natural colorant expertise and encapsulation capabilities make them a distinctive supplier for SKIN-TWIN's color-active formulation intelligence.
